summary: The skill has consequential behavior or structural ambiguity that requires manual review before installation.

skill.name: release
skill.description: Deploy the service using the repository release script.

findings.message: Observed system configuration behavior is not disclosed by the skill description or instructions.

recommendations: Disclose every consequential capability in the skill description and least-privilege workflow.
limitations: This static audit never executes the skill and cannot prove that a low-risk result is safe.
